candidate_definitions.text: (LMNet) Moving Object Segmentation in 3D LiDAR Data: A Learning-based Approach Exploiting Sequential Data (RAL/IROS 2021)
This repo contains the code for our paper: Moving Object Segmentation in 3D LiDAR Data:
Official page of ERASOR (Egocentric Ratio of pSeudo Occupancy-based Dynamic Object Removal), which is accepted @ RA-L'21 with ICRA'21

Official page of [*"ERASOR: Egocentric Ratio of Pseudo Occupancy-based Dynamic Object Removal for Static 3D Point Cloud Map Building"*](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/stamp/stamp.jsp?tp=&arnumber=9361109), which is accepted by RA-L with ICRA'21 option
LIO-SAM: Tightly-coupled Lidar Inertial Odometry via Smoothing and Mapping

**A real-time lidar-inertial odometry package. We strongly recommend the users read this document thoroughly and test the package with the provided dataset first. A video of the demonstration of the method can be found on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=A0H8CoORZJU).**
Robust LiDAR SLAM with a versatile plug-and-play loop closing and pose-graph optimization.

- ``2021-07-16``: This repository's easy-to-use plug-and-play loop detection and pose graph optimization module (named [SC-PGO](https://github.com/gisbi-kim/SC-A-LOAM/blob/main/src/laserPosegraphOptimization.cpp)) is also integrated with FAST-LIO2! see [FAST_LIO_SLAM](https://gi…
A LiDAR odometry pipeline that just works
